events.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
events.description: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

events.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
events.description: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
